rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Error message strings must match exactly — a trailing period difference ('User not found.' vs 'User not found') causes assertion failures.","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"HTTP status codes must match the actual source — 403 returned for missing roles but tests asserted 401.","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When writing tests for existing HOCs, assert on the actual source code behavior (e.g., check createError calls in auth-service.ts) rather than inferring expected values.","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"withAuth returns 403 (Forbidden) for insufficient roles, not 401 (Unauthorized) — use 403 for role/permission checks.","scope":"src/auth/withAuth.ts"}]}
